title: ChestCountMod
description: A Wynncraft mod which keeps track of and displays your chestcount and dry streak when opening loot chests.
body:
A Wynncraft mod which keeps track of and displays your chestcount and dry streak when opening loot chests.

The configs menu can be reached via /ccc or /chestcountmod

To view information about the last mythic you've found type /lastmythic
